visual_description: She peeks from behind a white door, long dark hair framing her face and a blue coat visible. Holding a knife in her right hand, she looks toward a large axe lodged in the wall, then grabs the axe and pulls it free, raising it toward the wall.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
